SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-11-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-25-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMITMENT TO BE OUT OF TOWN 4-8-065 THROUGH 4-17- -05 MADE BEFORE SUBPOENA RECEIVED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,276.31 FILED BY DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT UPSHUR, MARTHA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27944, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DODT, DAN
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT UPSHUR, MARTHA CROSS-COMPLAINT OF DAN DODT DENIED BOSED UPON CROSS-CLAIMANT'S FAILURE TO SERVE CROSS-DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UPSHUR, MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,232.00, NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM--O/C DEFENDANTS TO RE-SET & SERVE CROSS DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, OFF CALENDAR NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM--O/C DEFENDANTS TO RE-SET & SERVE CROSS DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,050.00 FILED BY UPSHUR, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UPSHUR, MARTHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DODT, DAN BLACKETER, LINDA JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 27944 ON 02/01/06. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE 10/17/05 ORDER OF DISMISSAL IS VACATED. NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
